conversations.user_instruction: make it of 350 words, and remove how to apply and success metrics
conversations.jd_after_snapshot:
# Online Business Development Executive

## About Us
WOGOM is a B2B Commerce and Retail Enablement Platform, empowering 6,000+ retailers and 450+ sellers across India with better Products, Pricing, Credit, and Growth Opportunities. Our goal is to build a connected ecosystem where technology, capital, and commerce converge to help Indian retailers scale with confidence.

## Role Overview
The Online Business Development Executive is a results-driven professional with a strong background in e-commerce and online business development, responsible for driving revenue growth and managing online channels. They will bring a data-driven mindset and excellent communication skills to navigate complex market trends and make informed decisions.

## Key Responsibilities
• Own and drive revenue growth targets across online channels, including Amazon and Flipkart, by developing and executing strategic plans to increase sales and market share.
• Manage and optimize online sales channels, including listings, A+ content, pricing, promotions, and catalog hygiene, to ensure a seamless customer experience and improve sales performance.
• Plan and execute product launches, coordinating with internal teams and marketplace category managers to ensure successful product introductions and maximize sales potential.
• Develop and maintain strong relationships with marketplace category managers to stay up-to-date on market trends and opportunities, and to negotiate better terms and conditions for WOGOM's sellers.
• Monitor key performance metrics, such as sales, revenue, and customer satisfaction, to drive continuous improvements and optimize online sales channels.

## Requirements
### Must-Have Skills
• Proven hands-on experience with Amazon Seller Central and Flipkart Seller Hub, with strong analytical skills and data-driven decision making.
• Strong analytical skills, with the ability to analyze sales data, identify trends, and optimize product listings and promotions.
• Excellent communication and coordination skills, with the ability to work with internal teams and marketplace category managers.
• Experience with e-commerce platform management, including managing and optimizing online sales channels.
• Ability to navigate complex market trends and adjust strategies accordingly, with a collaborative mindset and adaptability.

### Nice-to-Have Skills
• Experience with D2C platforms, with excellent communication and coordination ability.
• Familiarity with data analysis tools, such as Excel or Google Analytics.

## Who Will Succeed in This Role
The ideal candidate will have a collaborative mindset, with the ability to work with internal teams and marketplace category managers to drive business growth. They will be adaptable, with the ability to navigate changing market trends and adjust strategies accordingly.
